meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to End Tutorial Hell
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Master Claude Code skills setup with Antigravity to accelerate your SaaS MVP development and ship revenue-generating products faster.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell is a symptom of passive learning. To escape, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate and enforce architectural standards. By shifting from watching videos to active AI-assisted engineering, you force your stack to mirror production-grade SaaS requirements, ensuring every line of code contributes directly to your product's market viability.
content.intro:
You have watched the playlists. You have cloned the repos. Yet, your product remains a collection of disparate snippets rather than a cohesive, profitable SaaS. This is the silent killer of ventures: tutorial hell, where the comfort of guided instruction masks the terrifying reality that you aren't actually building a business—you are just consuming content.

True founders don't learn by watching; they learn by orchestrating high-velocity systems. By utilizing Claude Code in tandem with Antigravity, you transform your development environment from a sandbox into a production-ready assembly line. This guide isn't about code syntax; it is about architectural command, allowing you to bypass the learning curve and move directly to shipping.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Initialize your workspace to enforce strict project boundaries, preventing 'dependency drift' common in AI-generated prototypes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and generate a production-ready folder schema for a scalable SaaS MVP using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe.

steps.title: Context Loading
steps.description: Inject your business requirements directly into the Claude context to ensure the AI prioritizes revenue-generating features over abstract boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a PRD summary from the provided business requirements and inject it into the Claude system instructions.

steps.title: Architectural Enforcement
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your 'Golden Path' for API routes, ensuring every new feature follows your established authentication and error-handling patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Establish a standard boilerplate for API routes that includes JWT validation and standardized error logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply the golden path pattern to all new API routes'

steps.title: Automated Testing Loops
steps.description: Stop manual debugging. Configure Claude Code to run automated unit tests immediately following every code injection.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest tests for the current module, ensuring 90% coverage on critical payment path functions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'write and execute unit tests for the current feature'

steps.title: Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Finalize your build pipeline by automating environment variable sanitization and production-build checks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and optimize build scripts for production deployment on Vercel.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit security and optimize build for production'

pro_tips: Treat your system instructions as a living document; update them every time you pivot your business model.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store common edge cases so you never debug the same Stripe error twice.
Always force the AI to explain the 'why' behind a refactor to ensure you maintain architectural integrity.
Run periodic 'sanity audits' where you ask the AI to play the role of a security consultant against your own code.
Never accept the first output; use Antigravity to iterate on the prompt until the generated code meets your specific performance benchmarks.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, focus on shipping your first feature-complete user flow within 48 hours to validate your market hypothesis.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of learning and start building for the sake of revenue. The tools are ready; the market is waiting. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
